mapper.select: select count(1) from flight_permission p join flight_application a on p.application_id = a.id where p.permission_status = '0' and p.approved_start_time <= now() and p.approved_end_time >= now() and a.applicant_id = #{applicantId}

select count(1) from violation_record v join flight_permission p on v.permission_id = p.id join flight_application a on p.application_id = a.id
and a.applicant_id = #{applicantId}
